series.description: Botanical subjects — blossom canopies, tree studies.
series.evergreen_note: Timeless subject matter with stable search intent.
series.refill_note: Every bloom season, every tree study extends it.

series.description: When weather itself becomes the subject.
series.evergreen_note: Visually distinct light and weather conditions.
series.refill_note: Every shoot in notable weather adds to the series.

series.description: Cherry blossom, autumn colour, winter light, mist.
series.refill_note: Every shoot carries a season tag. Automatic refill.

series.description: A single walk, in order. One shoot, photographed as the place unfolded — outdoors, indoors, a building, a museum. Chronological; the sequence matters.
series.evergreen_note: A named route through a place is a thing people look for.
series.refill_note: Each Routes-mode shoot produces one entry.
